top_tweets.text:
Anthropic's Chief Product Officer sat on Figma's board.

Figma integrated Claude as their AI assistant.

On Monday he resigned from Figma. 

The same day, reports surfaced that Anthropic was building design tools.

Yesterday Anthropic launched Claude Design.

A direct Figma
top_tweets.author: TheGeorgePu
top_tweets.name: George Pu
top_tweets.summary_zh: Anthropic 首席產品官曾任 Figma 董事，在他辭去 Figma 職務當天，Anthropic 即傳出正在開發設計工具，隔日便推出 Claude Design，形成直接競爭關係。這起人事與產品發布的時序引發關注。

top_tweets.text:
product management tip: ragebaiting your user base/player base by making inaccurate claims about the quality of your systems is an incredibly fast way of identifying current problems with your software that you can then prioritize fixes for

easily the top reason I’m on here
top_tweets.author: drewlevin
top_tweets.name: Drew Levin
top_tweets.summary_zh: 產品管理技巧：故意對產品品質做出不準確的聲明來激怒用戶/玩家，是快速辨識軟體當前問題並排定修復優先順序的有效方法。

top_tweets.text: there are likely ~100 ppl alive today that deeply understand all of these together: product instinct, what makes good software, design, technical depth, a real model of ai, the psychology of a single user, the shape of culture, team building, the ability to motivate, & the
top_tweets.author: signulll
top_tweets.name: signüll
top_tweets.summary_zh: 目前全球可能只有約 100 人同時深度理解：產品直覺、優質軟體、設計、技術深度、AI 模型、用戶心理、文化趨勢、團隊建立、激勵能力等跨領域能力。

top_tweets.text:
The AI debate is difficult because one side views art as a product to be delivered as fast as possible. 

It's like going to a lake and telling fisherman that it's "more efficient" to buy fish from the grocery store. They aren't just there for the fish.
top_tweets.author: sean_gause
top_tweets.name: Sean // Hear Tell of Hauntings🥀
top_tweets.summary_zh: AI 辯論之所以困難，是因為一方將藝術視為需要盡快交付的產品。就像對釣魚者說去超市買魚更有效率——他們去湖邊不只是為了魚本身。

top_tweets.text:
If you want to know EXACTLY where CLAUDE DESIGN is incredible and where it falls short, you should probably watch this

-Wireframing  = 9/10
-Mobile app design = 8.5/10
-Deck research & design = 8.7/10
-Video creation - 4.5/10

fully unscripted episode of @startupideaspod 

no https://t.co/TcLpI3niGR
top_tweets.author: gregisenberg
top_tweets.name: GREG ISENBERG
top_tweets.summary_zh: Claude Design 在不同應用場景的實測評分：線框圖 9/10、行動應用設計 8.5/10、簡報研究與設計 8.7/10、影片製作 4.5/10。整體在靜態設計表現優異，但影片生成仍有明顯短板。

top_tweets.text:
ANTHROPIC PAYS ENGINEERS $750K PLUS TO UNDERSTAND LLMS AND STANFORD JUST TAUGHT MOST OF IT FOR FREE IN 2 HOURS

https://t.co/pzv5faa5yv
top_tweets.author: RoundtableSpace
top_tweets.name: 0xMarioNawfal
top_tweets.summary_zh: Anthropic 付給工程師年薪 75 萬美元以上來理解大型語言模型，而史丹佛剛剛用 2 小時免費課程教授了大部分相關知識。

top_tweets.text: “All I do is copy a template, then copy a template and I get - a template! Claude design is INSANE!” 😩
top_tweets.author: ransegall
top_tweets.name: Ran Segall
top_tweets.summary_zh: 諷刺 Claude Design 使用者只是在複製範本套用範本，最終得到的還是範本，質疑其創新價值。

top_tweets.text:
bros: vibe coding is so easy bro

also bros: googling how to rotate every env variable across their vibe coded apps on a Sunday because Vercel got breached and now every API key of theirs could be on a forum https://t.co/f8yQib5B7L
top_tweets.author: kloss_xyz
top_tweets.name: klöss
top_tweets.summary_zh: 諷刺 vibe coding 愛好者在 Vercel 資安事件後，週日忙著 Google 如何在所有用 vibe coding 做的 app 中輪換環境變數，因為所有 API key 可能已經外洩到論壇。

> Model-card recommended sampling for each

context.quoted_text:
Introducing Claude Design by Anthropic Labs: make prototypes, slides, and one-pagers by talking to Claude.

Powered by Claude Opus 4.7, our most capable vision model. Available in research preview on the Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise plans, rolling out throughout the day. https://t.co/2BgBGtgYGX

criteria.score_formula: likes（主要）+ Claude 人工過濾廣告/招聘/meme/非設計
claude_filter_rules: 排除純廣告、招聘文（有洞見的 JD 除外）
排除與產品設計/PM 無關（crypto、體育、政治等）
排除 meme/搞笑但無內容
偏好有觀點的原創內容

top_products.title: Tell
top_products.author: Will G
top_products.summary_zh: 為 Mac 設計的桌面小工具，提供更有趣的使用體驗。適合想要客製化桌面資訊顯示的 Mac 使用者。

top_products.title: Nibbo
top_products.author: Boston
top_products.tagline: Family hub with a 3D pet that grows as you get things done
top_products.summary_zh: 結合 3D 虛擬寵物的家庭協作中心，當你完成任務時寵物會隨之成長。適合希望透過遊戲化提升家庭成員參與度的家庭。

top_products.title: Fixa.dev
top_products.author: Etai Gabbai
top_products.tagline: A cloud-native AI agent that can build literally anything
top_products.summary_zh: 雲端原生 AI 代理，可自動構建各類應用與專案。針對需要快速開發與部署的開發者與團隊。

top_products.title: Creator OS
top_products.author: Jonh Alex
top_products.summary_zh: 幫助創作者管理與追蹤 Instagram 留言，避免遺漏重要互動。適合需要經營社群的內容創作者與行銷人員。

top_products.title: Grok Voice API
top_products.author: Zac Zuo
top_products.tagline: Fast, accurate STT and TTS APIs at the best price
top_products.summary_zh: 提供語音轉文字（STT）與文字轉語音（TTS）的 API 服務，強調速度、準確度與價格優勢。適合需要整合語音功能的開發者。
